summary: Comprehensive testing of DA Vehicle Gate Pass System after major refactoring. All 21 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI tests passed for admin dashboard, guard interface, database viewer, and mobile registration wizard.

issues: Collection selector missing data-testid attribute (minor - functionality works)

critical_code_review_comments: ESLint rule 'react-hooks/exhaustive-deps' was not found - fixed by changing to generic eslint-disable comment
Some components missing data-testid attributes for form inputs (visitor plate input, next step button in MobileRegistration) - functionality works but could improve testability
seed_data_creation: Test vehicles and visitors created during backend API testing with TEST- prefix
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core features tested and working: Admin login, Guard login, Dashboard stats, Vehicle management, Visitor registration, Scanning, Entry/Exit logs, Database viewer with CRUD operations, Mobile registration wizard with 3-step flow. Backend uses MongoDB with proper ObjectId handling. Frontend uses React with shadcn/ui components. PWA/offline support implemented via IndexedDB.
